scenarios.name: Network Latency
scenarios.description: Simulated 500ms latency via concurrent request bursts with timeout pressure
scenarios.streamBufferingNote: Latency within bounds — minimal stream buffering impact

scenarios.name: Database Connection Stress
scenarios.description: Simulate ~80% max_connections usage (16 concurrent hold for 3000ms)

scenarios.name: Memory Pressure
scenarios.description: Write 200 keys (~2MB) to Redis to approach memory ceiling

scenarios.name: Error Injection
scenarios.description: Simulate 5000ms timeouts on API calls; verify client retry behaviour
